HBM(고대역폭메모리) 수요 폭발 - 2026년 말까지 공급 부족 지속
AI 반도체 시장 $1조 규모 도달 전망 (2026년)
메모리 슈퍼사이클 진입 - DRAM/NAND 구조적 공급 부족
TSMC 2026년 매출 성장률 ~30% 전망 (애널리스트 평균 상회)
risks: 메모리 가격 급등으로 인한 수요 파괴 가능성
DDR4 공급 집중 (Nanya, Winbond) - 2027년 이후 심화
미중 무역갈등 - 반도체 수출규제 확대 리스크
과잉투자 후 2027년 이후 공급과잉 전환 가능성 (Micron $20B FY2026 CapEx)
opportunities: HBM 수요 폭증 - SK하이닉스, 삼성전자, Micron 수혜
AI 가속기 시장 확대 - NVIDIA Blackwell GPU, AMD MI300
메모리 부족으로 인한 가격 상승 → 메모리 기업 수익성 개선
AI 추론 시장 성장 - $76.24B (2025) → 급성장 전망

sources.title: 2026 AI & Semiconductor Outlook
sources.original_text: AI spending stepped down the stack. Memory and optics were the beneficiaries. The bottlenecks moved from GPUs to the things that feed and connect them.

sources.title: TSMC's Strong Outlook Fires Up Hopes of Sustained AI Boom
sources.original_text: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. is earmarking as much as $56 billion in capital spending for 2026, a stronger-than-anticipated projection that signals its confidence in the longevity of the global AI boom. It also foresees revenue growth of close to 30% in 2026, faster than the average analyst estimate.

sources.title: Memory Shortages Expected Beyond 2026
sources.original_text: Memory chip shortages—especially for DRAM, NAND, and high-bandwidth memory—are expected to continue through and beyond 2026, according to industry reports and executive commentary tied to rising demand and production limits.

sources.title: The AI frenzy is driving a memory chip supply crisis
sources.original_text: An acute global shortage of memory chips is forcing artificial intelligence and consumer-electronics companies to fight for dwindling supplies, as prices soar for the unglamorous but essential components. SK Hynix predicts memory shortage to last through late 2027.

sources.title: Data Center Chip Market Size Report 2032
sources.original_text: The global data center chip market size is projected to rise from US$ 55.2 Bn in 2025 to US$ 126.9 Bn by 2032. It is anticipated to witness a CAGR of 12.6% during the forecast period from 2025 to 2032.

sectors.name: 로봇/자동화
key_drivers: 휴머노이드 로봇 상용화 원년 (2026년)
Tesla Optimus Gen 3 - 8.5 mph 속도, 50개 액추에이터 손
Figure 2 BMW 공장 배치, Agile One 자동차 산업 도입
중국 자율주행 청소로봇 200대+ 시범운영, 500개+ 기업 도입 검토
1X Neo 가정용 로봇 월 $500 렌탈 출시, Tangible Eggy $1,500 판매
risks: 안전 이슈 - 60-75kg 기계가 8+ mph로 이동시 사고 위험
기술 성숙도 불확실성 - 대량생산 단계 미검증
opportunities: 노동력 부족 해결 - 고령화 사회의 구조적 수요
Tesla 2030년 연간 100만대 생산 목표
Physical AI (체화된 AI) 시장 급성장
제조업 자동화 확대 - 반도체, 자동차, 전자제품
가정용 로봇 시장 개화 - 가사, 돌봄 서비스

sources.title: AI-Powered Humanoid Robots Billion Dollar Market
sources.original_text: The humanoid robot industry is influenced by evolving needs in personal assistance, healthcare, and industrial automation. Next-generation robotics platforms are expanding addressable markets and unlocking long-term recurring revenue potential.

sources.title: Humanoid Robot Stocks: CES 2026 Reveals Commercial Breakout
sources.original_text: Humanoid robots just went from vaporware to viable.

sources.title: What's Coming in 2026 - Humanoid Robots Timeline
sources.original_text: Tesla Optimus Gen 3: 8.5 mph, with Figure matching within hours. China trials: 200+ autonomous sanitation robots, 500+ enterprise buyers evaluating deployment. Late 2025: 1X Neo ships to homes ($500/month); Tangible Eggy sells for ~$1,500. Early 2026: Factory rollout scales—Figure 2 at BMW, Agile One in automotive; $16K–$80K vs $35K–$50K/year labor.

sources.title: The Dawn of Humanoid Robots and Physical AI
sources.original_text: The global humanoid robot industry has developed rapidly, with progress to date indicating a shift from research and pilot programs to large-scale production by 2026. By 2026, physical AI is expected to proliferate through direct sales or leasing of humanoid robots, fundamentally reshaping industries, homes, and economic landscapes.

sources.title: Elon Musk on the Humanoid Robot Market
sources.original_text: Elon Musk used his latest CNBC appearance to double down on a bold idea: humanoid robots will define Tesla's future even more than cars. He repeated that demand for humanoid robots will be 'insatiable' and predicted that Tesla could reach production of around one million units per year by 2030.

key_drivers: GLP-1 경구제(알약) 출시 임박 - 주사제 대비 접근성 혁신
AI 신약개발 확산 - 임상 효율성 개선
중국 바이오텍 딜 급증 ($92.2B, 2024년 대비 2배)
2025년 헬스케어 S&P500 대비 저조 (16% vs 12%) → 밸류에이션 매력
risks: GLP-1 경쟁 심화 - Eli Lilly, Novo Nordisk 외 신규 진입자
opportunities: GLP-1 적응증 확대 - 비만, 당뇨 외 심혈관, NASH, 알츠하이머
AI 기반 항비만 소분자 신약 발굴
고령화 인구 증가 - 구조적 수요 확대
바이오텍 M&A 활성화 - 대형 제약사 파이프라인 확보
의료기기/진단 AI 도입 가속화

sources.title: Healthcare Sector Outlook 2026: GLP-1 Pills and AI Adoption
sources.original_text: Healthcare will be the best performing sector of 2026. Healthcare underperformed the broader market in 2025. While the S and P 500 gained roughly 16%, healthcare was up closer to 12%. But that relative underperformance is exactly why the sector looks interesting going into 2026. There are two major forces setting healthcare up for a strong year. The first is GLP 1 pills.

sources.title: Pharma M&A, China deals and GLP-1s: What to watch in 2026
sources.original_text: Deals involving Chinese pharma and biotech firms reached $92.2 billion in potential value through November 2025. That's nearly double the $51.9 billion recorded in 2024. I expect this trend of rising deal value to continue into 2026, fueled by factors such as impending patent cliffs faced by western pharma.

sources.title: Obesity GLP-1 Market Analysis 2025-2035
sources.original_text: The obesity GLP-1 market is projected to grow from USD 8169.0 million in 2025 to USD 65,364 million by 2035, advancing at a CAGR of 23.1%. Semaglutide is expected to lead the market with a 58% share in 2025.

sources.title: 2026 Life Sciences Outlook
sources.original_text: Surveyed life sciences executives are optimistic about their own organizations' financial outlooks, but identify a need for resilience in a complex global landscape.

sources.title: What's next for GLP-1 innovation
sources.original_text: Few categories in modern medicine have captured the imagination of patients, physicians, and investors as quickly as GLP-1 receptor agonists. These drugs have become cultural touchstones, economic disruptors—and the centerpiece of a high-stakes race to innovate among pharmaceutical giants.

opportunities: 원자력 재평가 - SMR(소형모듈원전) 상용화 진전

sources.title: Global energy in 2026: Growth, resilience and competition
sources.original_text: Global energy investment in 2025 is likely to have passed $3.3 trillion, with $2.2 trillion flowing into clean energy technologies. That's a sign that the energy transition is still happening, but the language being used is different. Today, the energy transition is about security, resilience and technologies.

sources.title: 2026 Renewable Energy Industry Outlook
sources.original_text: Renewables recalibrate for resilience amid policy shifts.

sources.title: World Energy Outlook 2025
sources.original_text: The IEA's flagship World Energy Outlook (WEO) is the most authoritative source of global energy analysis and projections. It includes exploration of the consequences of conflicts, trade disputes, and technological shifts on global energy security.

sources.title: Short-Term Energy Outlook - January 2026
sources.original_text: This edition of our Short-Term Energy Outlook (STEO) is the first to include forecasts for 2027.

sources.title: Goldman Sachs 2026 Commodity Outlook: Buy gold to $4,900, sell oil
sources.original_text: The 2026 setup: AI power demand, excess oil, and a narrowing gas spread.

sources.title: Outlook 2026: Miners in the spotlight - Multi-year upcycle for commodities
sources.original_text: Commodities will be more important than ever in 2026 amid growing demand, structurally tight supply, and with increased strategic and geopolitical focus on critical raw materials. Gold and silver were standout performers in 2025, with precious metals miners emerging as one of the best-performing asset classes globally.

sources.original_text: 2026 Outlook: Ride the Power Race and Supply Waves

sources.title: Most mineral and metal prices to edge higher in 2026
sources.original_text: Analysts at BMI, a unit of Fitch Solutions, are cautiously optimistic about the metal and mining year.

에너지-원자재.description: 배터리 금속(리튬, 코발트), 원자력(우라늄) 등 에너지 전환 관련 원자재 수요 연동

헬스케어-원자재.description: 직접적 연관성 낮음, 독립적 섹터 움직임

summary.overall_outlook: 2026년 5개 핵심 섹터 모두 구조적 성장 동력 보유. 반도체/AI가 가장 강력한 모멘텀을 보이며, 로봇/자동화와 헬스케어가 뒤를 이음. 에너지는 정책 불확실성으로 중립, 원자재는 금 강세와 전략적 광물 수요로 긍정적 전망.
